---
name: Crash/Disconnect Report
about: File a crash report or disconnect issue
title: "[Crash]: "
labels: crash
assignees: ''

---

Prior to filling out this crash report, please make sure of the following:

    You tried on the latest version of the pack.
    You don't have any extra other mods installed.

Possible Fixes*

Have you tried the above mentioned points?

Modpack Version*

What version of the pack are you using?

Crash Assistant Message (big green button)

When you crash, Crash Assistant should popup and click Upload all and copy message, wait for logs to be uploaded, after it is done, paste here.

What happened?*

Please give a thorough explanation of what happened. Attach/Link relevant images/files in relation to the issue!

Crash Log or Disconnect Log

Please upload your crash log to https://mclo.gs/ and leave the link here. Located in /<instance name>/crash-reports/ or /<instance name>/debug/

Latest.Log

Please upload your latest.log to https://mclo.gs/ and leave the link here. Note this file is different to a crash report. Located in /<instance name>/logs/.
